hero.label: Advanced Aesthetic Medicine · Torrevieja
hero.title: Your best self
hero.subtitle: Advanced aesthetic medicine treatments with cutting-edge technology. Real results, personalised care.

about.label: About Us
about.title: Aesthetic excellence,
about.text1: NK Medicina Estética was born from the vision of Natasha Knaus, who started in 2018 with a barber's chair in a 2m² space under a salon staircase in England. What seemed impossible became the beginning of a reference clinic in Torrevieja, Spain.
about.text2: Trained in Advanced Aesthetic Medicine in the UK and Portugal, with specialisations across Brazil and Europe, Natasha leads a highly qualified multidisciplinary team. Her philosophy: knowledge before trends, evidence before promises, safety above all.

services.label: Our Treatments
services.title: Everything your
services.subtitle: From facial harmonisation to vascular aesthetic medicine — we offer the most complete range of aesthetic treatments in Torrevieja.

categories.title: Facial Harmonisation
categories.desc: Hyaluronic acid, rhinomodelation, jaw contouring, rejuvenation

categories.title: Botulinum Toxin
categories.desc: Facial Botox, Brow Lift, bruxism, Nefertiti Lift, gummy smile

categories.title: Collagen Biostimulators
categories.desc: Sculptra, Radiesse, collagen biostimulation, sagging skin

categories.title: Facial Treatments
categories.desc: Hydrafacial, peels, microneedling, dark spots, acne

categories.title: Body Aesthetics
categories.desc: Localised fat, cellulite, sagging, body remodelling

categories.title: Aesthetic Technology
categories.desc: Radiofrequency, aesthetic laser, plasma, LED therapy, cavitation

categories.title: Vascular Medicine
categories.desc: Sclerotherapy, spider veins, microvessels, vascular assessment

technology.label: Technology
technology.title: State-of-the-art
technology.text: We invest in the most advanced technologies in the aesthetic market to guarantee superior results with maximum safety.
technology.feature1Desc: Artificial intelligence skin analysis scanner for precise diagnostics
technology.feature2Desc: Advanced rejuvenation, scars and dark spots with certified equipment
technology.feature3Desc: Body and facial sagging with high-efficacy non-invasive technology
